examples: They had welded a bunch of untrained recruits into an efficient fighting force.
A well-trained dog is more confident and can more safely be allowed a greater amount of freedom than an untrained one.
We may have to resort to using untrained staff.
Among the untrained staff who helped to perform the terminations was Gosnell's wife, Pearl.
Some of the torrid back story might be lost on untrained noses like mine.
